case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. CHRISTINA H SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $246.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100117927) AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CHRISTINA H

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CHRISTINA H $2,064.17 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,310.17, SEE SCANNED DOC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100140209) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CHRISTINA H
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-09-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200002609), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED NOV-11-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CHRISTINA H

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-08-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-09-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
